allow: Bash(python3 -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\(''assets/images/tileset.png''\); print\(f''Size: {img.size[0]}x{img.size[1]}  Tiles: {img.size[0]//40} cols x {img.size[1]//40} rows''\)")
Bash(find engine/ -name "*.js" -exec sed -i "s/''bold \\\([0-9]*\\\)px ''Press Start 2P'', monospace''/""bold \\1px ''Press Start 2P'', monospace""/g" {} +)
Bash(find engine/ -name "*.js" -exec sed -i "s/''italic \\\([0-9]*\\\)px ''Press Start 2P'', monospace''/""italic \\1px ''Press Start 2P'', monospace""/g" {} +)
Bash(find engine/ -name "*.js" -exec sed -i "s/''\\\([0-9]*\\\)px ''Press Start 2P'', monospace''/""\\1px ''Press Start 2P'', monospace""/g" {} +)
Bash(find engine/ -name "*.js" -exec sed -i "s/''bold 50px ''Press Start 2P'', monospace''/""bold 50px ''Press Start 2P'', monospace""/g" {} +)
